resources.string:
On a physical phone: open the same /api/v1/health URL in Chrome here — if it hangs, the phone cannot reach your PC (wrong IP, different Wi‑Fi, or firewall).

USB cable to this PC: on the PC run adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000 — then set the base URL to http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/v1/ and tap Test connection.

On Windows, allow inbound TCP port 3000 (Node.js) in Windows Defender Firewall for Private networks.

Check the server address before signing in. For Railway use HTTPS and your .up.railway.app host (the app adds /api/v1 if you omit it). On a local PC use your LAN IP and port 3000. Tap Test connection to verify.
Loan and savings alerts from your group
Open the app to read details
